title: C# Quiz
questions:
41. C# Structs are value types. What does this console script display?
struct Point { public int X; }
static void Main() { Point p = new Point { X = 5 }; object obj = p; ((Point)obj).X = 10; Console.WriteLine(p.X + " " + ((Point)obj).X); }
A) 5 10
B) 10 10
C) 5 5
D) Compile Error

44. In C#, how does a structural float evaluation compare to a double?
float f = 0.1f; double d = 0.1;
Console.WriteLine(f == d);
A) True
B) False
C) Compile Error
D) Throws precision mismatch exception

48. What is the evaluation of this string null conditional assignment?
string s = null;
Console.WriteLine(s?.Length ?? -1);
A) NullReferenceException
B) -1
C) 0
D) Compile Error

50. Let's see how C# deals with implicit conversion evaluations on conditional ternary expressions:
var result = true ? 10 : (int?)null;
Console.WriteLine(result.GetType());
A) System.Int32
B) System.Nullable`1[System.Int32]
C) Compile Error
D) Runtime Exception

51. What happens when an exception is rethrown via throw ex;?
try { throw new InvalidOperationException("Error"); } catch (Exception ex) { throw ex; }
A) Maintains original stack trace fully
B) Wipes out original stack trace and resets it
C) Compile error
D) Crash

53. C# const vs readonly field bindings. What is true?
A) Both runtime
B) const compile-time, readonly runtime
C) same
D) error

55. What is the value of val after using a logical pattern match statement?
object o = "123";
if (o is string s && s.Length > 2) { Console.WriteLine("Match"); }
A) Match
B) Error
C) Crash
D) False

56. What does this bitwise shift operations produce?
int value = -1;
Console.WriteLine(value >> 1);
A) 2147483647
B) -1
C) 0
D) Error

57. C# async methods that return void instead of Task have what trait?
A) safe
B) fire-and-forget
C) sync
D) error

58. How does the default literal look on reference types vs integers?
string s = default; int i = default;
Console.WriteLine((s == null) + " " + (i == 0));
A) True True
B) False False
C) Error
D) True False

60. What is the behavior of explicit boolean cast conversions with dynamic types?
dynamic d = "true";
bool b = (bool)d;
A) true
B) false
C) Runtime exception
D) error
